news.title: Nvidia's AI chip sales in China stall, as local chipmakers like Huawei take the lead
news.description: In the race between the U.S. and China to develop artificial intelligence, the battle over hardware and computing power is heating up as Chinese companies like Huawei overtake global industry leaders like Nvidia in their home market

news.title: Lessons from Anthropic on building effective human-agent teams | Claude by Anthropic
news.description: The way we work with AI is evolving from a single-player to a multiplayer experience, where humans and agents work together as a team to achieve shared goals. We share examples of this new way of working in action.
